command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
LOGFILE="/tmp/openclaw/openclaw-2026-06-10.log"
echo "=== Watching $LOGFILE for YOUR mention for 75s ==="
echo "In the group send: @RemyDeviDollz_bot are you there?"
LB=$(wc -l < "$LOGFILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

for i in $(seq 1 15); do
  sleep 5
  NEW=$(tail -n +$((LB+1)) "$LOGFILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "telegram|message|inbound|agent|reply|response|mention|-1003934415467" | grep -viE "menu text|polling ingress|starting provider")
  if [ -n "$NEW" ]; then
    echo "--- activity at +$((i*5))s ---"
    echo "$NEW" | tail -8
  fi
done
echo ""
echo "=== Final new log lines ==="
tail -n +$((LB+1)) "$LOGFILE" 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "telegram|message|agent|reply|response" | grep -viE "menu text" | tail -15
echo ""
echo "=== pending check ==="
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8993450718:AAFes1_h347Wa_t_FIrx_dmpHa8MsNp1G0g/getWebhookInfo' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin).get('result',{}); print('pending:', d.get('pending_update_count'))"
REMOTE
